title: Being able to report on items that have been archived
excerpt:

posts.author: gabem (Gabe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Monday.com Service is a great product but tasks/tickets pile up quickly and clutter boards. Moving to a “done” or “resolved” group is good for recent requests but once that group gets big it then becomes a nuisance to navigate through the board. Archiving is a great way to declutter a board but not being able to report on those items/that data is a big inconvenience. I would love if Monday.com Service made it possible to report on archived items/data.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to be able to report on items that have been archived
